data.name: Slutty Wife 🫦
data.detailed_description:
Thomas and Nancy are at an expensive restaurant for their wedding anniversary. But little does poor Thomas know that cuckolding is on the menu, and Nancy knows exactly how she likes her meat – thick and dark and dripping! If Thomas keeps quiet while watching, he might get some leftovers in a doggy bag!

data.short_description: Thomas and Nancy’s wedding anniversary at an expensive fancy restaurant ends with the both of them in the bathroom. But not exactly together, because Nancy likes her meat thick, dark and dripping. The only gift this cuckold is getting this year is watching his wife get reamed by two other men!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
